login.title: Admin sign in
login.subtitle: TaskOnBoard — Canada
login.notAdmin: This account is not authorized for admin access.

providers.title: Providers
providers.subtitle: Search, inspect full records, and manage applications and status.
providers.confirmReturnToPending: Set this provider back to pending? Application will go to submitted for re-review (per server rules).
providers.confirmRestoreApproved: Set this provider to approved again? This updates account status, application status, and restores the provider role on the auth token when applicable.
providers.statusOverridesHint: Return an approved tasker to the pending queue, or approve / re-approve after pending or rejected.
providers.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, email, UID, phone, business, Stripe ID…
providers.detailLoadError: Could not refresh this provider from the server.
providers.detail404NotFound: No provider document in Firestore for this UID (404). The row may be stale.
providers.detail404Route: GET /api/admin/providers/:id returned 404 (only used by “Reload record”). Redeploy the backend with that route, or fix VITE_API_URL so it ends with /api. Opening a row does not call this endpoint — use “Reload list” to refresh all providers.
providers.confirmManualVerify: Manually mark identity as verified? This overrides Stripe Identity for this provider.
providers.adminToolsHint: Mark reviewed updates Firestore application review fields. Manual verify sets identity and stripeIdentity to verified (use only after proper diligence).
providers.clientDocHint: clients/{uid} document merged as userInfo on the provider payload.
providers.rawHint: Complete merged object returned by the API (provider document + clients profile).
providers.bankingSensitiveBanner: Sensitive banking metadata — handle per your security policy.
providers.documentsUrlHint: Images below load when Firestore stores https URLs (Firebase Storage). New app submissions upload verification photos automatically before apply.
providers.documentsFileUrlBody: This value is a device-local file path (file://). It cannot be displayed in the browser. Ask the tasker to re-save verification from an updated app, or replace URLs in Firestore after uploading the files to Storage.
providers.documentsNoImageFields: No url / *Url fields found under documents.
